# RM JEWEL

> RM JEWEL is a Hebrew-language platform for designing open brass bracelets and
> rings from a plain-language description. You describe a cutout pattern in
> words; an AI generates it, automatically checks it is manufacturable
> (bridge widths, hole sizes, margins, roll-forming survivability), and
> exports a laser-cutting file (DXF in millimetres). Precision jewelry,
> formed around you.

## Product
- Material: C260 brass, 1.5 mm, fiber-laser cut, roll-formed into an open arc.
- Products: open bracelet (from ₪320), open ring (from ₪240).
- Made to order, 10–14 working days.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://rmjewel.com/): what RM JEWEL is and how to start.
- [Design](https://rmjewel.com/design): the guided client journey — product, sizes, idea & upload, AI chat, design suggestions, edit, and final visualization & price.
- [How it works](https://rmjewel.com/how-it-works): the four steps — describe, generate, production check, export.
- [Gallery](https://rmjewel.com/gallery): illustrative pattern styles.
- [FAQ](https://rmjewel.com/faq): material, sizes, ordering.
- [Studio](https://rmjewel.com/studio): the advanced design tool itself.
- [Contact](https://rmjewel.com/contact): reach the team.

## Notes
- Pricing and lead time are quoted per design on request.
- Gallery images are decorative illustrations, not products for sale.
